title: phlomoides sogdiana
intro: Phlomoides sogdiana, also known as Sogdian calamint, is a perennial plant species within the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, contributing to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Phlomoides sogdiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
